import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  nums
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let xs = parse_line(line1)
let ys = parse_line(line2)
let total = list.len(xs)
mut k = 0
while k < total
  match list.get(xs, k)
  when Some(a)
    match list.get(ys, k)
    when Some(b)
      println("#{a}+#{b}=#{a + b}")
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end
